title: PIVOT — Sara has THE idea
prompt: Slow push-in extreme close-up in @kitchen on @Sara's face only — Sara fills the frame. Soft morning sunlight catches in her hair. Sara's eyes slowly widen as something CLICKS — gears turning, a smile creeping up. The camera holds tight on the moment of realization. Sara (whispered, awed at her own idea): "Oh… OH. Oh-oh-oh-oh — wait. WAIT." Sara (louder, lighting up): "I have a PLAN. I have a really REALLY good plan!" Bright cheerful music sting on the realization. Solo shot, no other people in frame, no other faces visible.
